# shelly_dali_config (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `ip` (String) The IP address of the Shelly device.

### Optional

- `cg_count` (Number) Number of scanned control gears (null if scan has never been executed)
